prompt: A [plated dish] on [surface] — [lens] locked at exact dish-edge level, the camera so low it sees the dish in cross-section profile rather than from above, [garnish or topping] visible as a skyline against the background, [sauce detail] on the plate surface catching [light source] from camera-left, [color contrast] the deliberate palette of the dish's composition, [background element] soft and out of focus behind, editorial restaurant photography from an angle that is never seen in menus, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
